Klasse FileRepository

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.FileRepository
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
PluginRepository
public class FileRepository extends Object implements PluginRepository

A file-based implementation of the PluginRepository.

This repository stores plugin JAR files in a structured directory tree starting from a root directory. The structure follows a Maven-like pattern: root/group_part1/group_part2/name/version/.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • fileRepository

      public static FileRepository fileRepository(@NonNull String root)

      Creates a new FileRepository with the specified root directory path.

      Parameter:
      root - the path to the root directory as a string; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new FileRepository instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if root is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • fileRepository

      public static FileRepository fileRepository(@NonNull Path root)

      Creates a new FileRepository with the specified root directory.

      Parameter:
      root - the root directory path; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a new FileRepository instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if root is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • store

      public void store(@NonNull PluginId pluginId, @NonNull Supplier<InputStream> inputStreamSupplier) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Stores a plugin's data in the repository.

      Angegeben von:
      store in Schnittstelle PluginRepository
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      inputStreamSupplier - the Supplier providing the JAR content as an InputStream; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be stored
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • retrieve

      public @NonNull Supplier<InputStream> retrieve(@NonNull PluginId pluginId) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Retrieves a plugin's data from the repository.

      Angegeben von:
      retrieve in Schnittstelle PluginRepository
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      a Supplier for the plugin's JAR as an InputStream
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be retrieved
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • contains

      public boolean contains(@NonNull PluginId pluginId)

      Checks if a plugin with the specified ID is stored in the repository.

      Angegeben von:
      contains in Schnittstelle PluginRepository
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the plugin is present, false otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • remove

      public void remove(@NonNull PluginId pluginId) throws PluginRepositoryException

      Removes a plugin from the repository.

      Angegeben von:
      remove in Schnittstelle PluginRepository
      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin; must not be null
      Löst aus:
      PluginRepositoryException - if the plugin could not be removed
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • plugins

      public @NonNull Set<PluginId> plugins()

      Returns a set of all plugin identifiers currently stored in the repository.

      Angegeben von:
      plugins in Schnittstelle PluginRepository
      Gibt zurück:
      an unmodifiable set of PluginIds
      Seit:
      1.0.0
